category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Cote d'Ivoire CODINORM standardisation, VoC import conformity, energy labelling, and NI/IEC 60335-2-24 safety requirements.

title.en: China-to-Côte d'Ivoire Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入科特迪瓦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入科特迪瓦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Côte d'Ivoire CODINORM NI standards, the Ministry of Trade Verification of Conformity (VoC) import inspection programme, energy labelling, NI/IEC 60335-2-24 electrical safety, R-600a refrigerant handling, and French-language documentation and in-country importer requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与科特迪瓦CODINORM NI标准、贸易部进口符合性验证（VoC）检验计划、能效标识、NI/IEC 60335-2-24电气安全、R-600a制冷剂处理及法语文件和本地进口商要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與科特迪瓦CODINORM NI標準、貿易部進口符合性驗證（VoC）檢驗計劃、能效標識、NI/IEC 60335-2-24電氣安全、R-600a製冷劑處理及法語文件和本地進口商要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment body determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Côte d'Ivoire legislation, CODINORM NI standards, the Verification of Conformity (VoC) programme requirements, energy labelling rules, and import documentation obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行科特迪瓦法律、CODINORM NI标准、符合性验证（VoC）计划要求、能效标识规则及进口文件义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行科特迪瓦法律、CODINORM NI標準、符合性驗證（VoC）計劃要求、能效標識規則及進口文件義務。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers exporting to Côte d'Ivoire face four practical compliance gaps: (1) electrical safety conformity to NI standards adopting IEC 60335-2-24 — CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not automatically recognised, and refrigerators are typically regulated products subject to the Verification of Conformity (VoC) import programme; (2) a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) issued under the Ministry of Trade VoC scheme is generally required at the port (Abidjan or San-Pedro) before customs clearance, on a per-shipment or registered-product basis; (3) energy labelling/MEPS expectations are developing rather than an EU-style EPREL database, so requirements must be confirmed with CODINORM and the Ministry; and (4) French-language product documentation, instructions, and markings plus a locally established importer/responsible party are needed. R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned and accepted, but charge and flammability documentation should reference IEC 60335-2-24. Côte d'Ivoire does not operate EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regimes, so those EU-specific obligations do not apply.
answer_first.zh: 向科特迪瓦出口的中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四项实际合规差距：（1）电气安全须符合采用IEC 60335-2-24的NI标准——CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被自动承认，且电冰箱通常属于受进口符合性验证（VoC）计划监管的产品；（2）通常须在港口（阿比让或圣佩德罗）通关前取得贸易部VoC计划下签发的符合性证书（CoC），按每批货物或注册产品方式办理；（3）能效标识/MEPS要求尚在发展中，而非欧盟式EPREL数据库，故须向CODINORM及贸易部确认具体要求；（4）须提供法语产品文件、说明书及标识，并设有本地设立的进口商/责任方。R-600a制冷剂具备良好条件并被接受，但充注量及可燃性文件应参照IEC 60335-2-24。科特迪瓦不实行欧盟式横向RoHS、电池或户外噪声制度，故该等欧盟专项义务不适用。
answer_first.zht: 向科特迪瓦出口的中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四項實際合規差距：（1）電氣安全須符合採用IEC 60335-2-24的NI標準——CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被自動承認，且電冰箱通常屬於受進口符合性驗證（VoC）計劃監管的產品；（2）通常須在港口（阿比讓或聖佩德羅）通關前取得貿易部VoC計劃下簽發的符合性證書（CoC），按每批貨物或註冊產品方式辦理；（3）能效標識/MEPS要求尚在發展中，而非歐盟式EPREL數據庫，故須向CODINORM及貿易部確認具體要求；（4）須提供法語產品文件、說明書及標識，並設有本地設立的進口商/責任方。R-600a製冷劑具備良好條件並被接受，但充注量及可燃性文件應參照IEC 60335-2-24。科特迪瓦不實行歐盟式橫向RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲制度，故該等歐盟專項義務不適用。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon change to CODINORM NI standards or the Ministry of Trade Verification of Conformity (VoC) programme
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. verified remains false and human_reviewed remains false until a named reviewer confirms each row against an official CODINORM, Ministry of Trade, or primary legal source. Local PDFs not accepted as canonical.
